title: Beyond Ed Buck
overview: Follows the tragic murders that took place at the hands of Democratic political donor Edward Buck, while also unpacking internalized homophobia, the psychological root of predatory behaviors, and providing a deeper exploration of challenges faced by the black and brown LGBTQ+ community.
